Observation on functionality of all OPD's. : On hybrid mode of inspection it is observed that all OPDs are available and functional. These OPDs are having concerned departmental consultants, adequatespace, equipments/instruments, wash basins and washrooms. On the day ofvisitation Patients were present in the OPDs.Cash receipts are not available for OPD patients as the institution has made it free of cost for all the patients. BMW dustbins were not well managed all over. Aadhaar no. are missing on central OPD registers

Observation on functionality of all Hospital. : internees students duties not properly managed. Section for Kriya Kalpa is not available. GOB records found missing. NICU is lack of instrumentation. Aadhaar no. are missing on central IPD registers

Observation on Conditions of Deparments. : All departments were having charts, models, specimens, equipments insufficient numbers. Departmental liabrary of all departments have sufficientnumber of books.In all departments computer and printers are available .Dissection hall has adequate specimen, dissection table, dissection setsand sitting arrangement. One dissected cadaver was present in dissection hallwith dissected body parts available. Dissection is being done .Teachingpharmacy is having required number of equipments and machinery andmedicines are being prepared for both practical and dispensing purposeand pharmacy is having GMP certification . MOU for Quality testing lab is made. Five classrooms with adequate space and projectors is

available.Common room for boys and girls, hostel facility is available. Herbal garden withdemonstration room with adequate number of species is present butbarcoding was not done on plants . Central library was having required no ofbooks with one computer and printer having internet facilitypresent. Digital library is present with 10 computers. Sitting arrangement for students and faculty members wasadequate.Library books were arranged in order and library management systemwas installed but not used effectively. Hostel Facility is available separately for boys and girls. Seminarhall with proper audio video equipments and sitting arrangements is available.

Overall opinion about Hospital/Colleges. : On the day of visitation, all OPDs and IPDs were found functional andpatients a were present there. It is verified thatthe college and hospital has necessary infrastructure and equipment (some are missing) and otherfacilities like College bus, Ambulance, Genset, and playground with sportsfacility. Hospital staff, teaching and non teaching staff were present on the dayof visitation.Classes (theory and practical) are beingconducted regularly. During interaction with the students it was found thatclasses were conducting regularly and practicals and dissection is alsobeing done On the Day of visitation among 49 teaching Staff .49. teaching staffalong with Principal were present as mentioned in part -1.Yoga teacher and Bio statician were also present which are included in teaching staff. Among 75 non-teaching staff,62 were present, 08 were on informed leave. Mr Rohit pharmacognosist, Mr. Narender Kumar LA, Mr. Jagmender gardener, Mr Naresh Kumar MTS, Mr. Omparkash MTS, Mr. Anand Kunar MTS, Mr. Ashok Kumar, Mr Rajinder Driver. Among .113Hospital staff were verified, 10 were on informed leave i.e and mr. vikas kumar ecg technician, mr. bajrang lal MTS, DR. Suman Sharma RMO, Mrs. Nita nurse, Mrs. Seema Nurse, Mrs. Sunita Nurse, Mr. Jaideep Sharma LT, Mrs. Kirti Assistant matron, Dr. Tanuja RMO, Mr. Nafees Cook, 9 Relieved From the job. On call 3 allopathy doctors were excluded from photo and verification. 1 analytical chemist,1pharmacognocist and 1 biochemist are on part time, were verified. One site engineer was not available unauthentically so rejected. MOU is made for QT lab.
Supportive documents/points on the lancunae. : Yogya lab could have been made functional.

Observation regarding deficience observed by visitors. : Some instruments and equipment according to MSR 2016 and MESAR 2024 are not available which are mentioned in the respective tabs. Shalakya OPD needs more diagnostic equipments like HUMPHREY'S etc for effective functioning.

AEBAS Remarks : Some faculties are coming from long distance so video footage of their AEBAS punching is requested for some particular dates as well as college is requested to give video footage of AEBAS and registration counter of hospital for 3 months

Any other observation. : College had total 47 teaching faculty at the time of Part 1 . Information submitted by the college in Part-1 are found to be true.one teacher Dr.Parul Kaushik Teaching Code AYKB00595 has been promted from Associate Professor toProfessor on date 05/05/2026. one non teaching Manoj Kumar joined on post of MTS on 01/05/2026one Hospital staff joined Mr. Akash as post of nurse on 14/03/2026
